orderTrackingDescription: Enter your tracking number below to track your order status and delivery progress in real-time.
trackingNumberNotFound: We couldn't find any tracking information for this number. Please check the number and try again.
subscriptionError: Failed to subscribe to tracking updates
unsubscriptionError: Failed to unsubscribe from tracking updates
step1Description: Locate the tracking number in your order confirmation email or shipping notification.
step2Description: Type your tracking number into the search box above and click 'Track'.
step3Description: View real-time updates on your package location and estimated delivery time.
faq1Question: Where can I find my tracking number?
faq1Answer: Your tracking number can be found in your order confirmation email, shipping notification email, or by logging into your account and viewing your order history.
faq2Question: How often is tracking information updated?
faq2Answer: Tracking information is typically updated every 24-48 hours as the package moves through the carrier's network. During peak times, updates may be slightly delayed.
faq3Question: What should I do if my package is delayed?
faq3Answer: If your package is delayed beyond the estimated delivery date, please contact our customer support team. We can investigate the delay and provide you with updated information.

timeline.order_placed_desc: Your order has been received and is being processed.
timeline.order_confirmed_desc: Your order has been confirmed by our team.
timeline.packing_desc: Your package is being prepared for shipment.
timeline.packed_desc: Your package has been packed and is ready for pickup.
timeline.shipped_desc: Your package has been shipped and is on its way.
timeline.in_transit_desc: Your package is traveling to its destination.
timeline.out_for_delivery_desc: Your package is on the delivery vehicle and will arrive today.
timeline.attempted_delivery_desc: A delivery attempt was made but was unsuccessful.
timeline.delivered_desc: Your package has been delivered successfully!
timeline.failed_desc: Delivery of your package has failed.
timeline.returned_desc: Your package has been returned to sender.
timeline.lost_desc: Your package has been lost in transit.
timeline.held_desc: Your package is being held at a carrier facility.
timeline.customs_desc: Your package is being processed by customs.

seo.trackingDescription: Tracking number {{trackingNumber}} - Current status: {{status}}. Estimated delivery: {{estimatedDelivery}}. Track your package in real-time.
